<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `x-sonarcloud`

Fetch SonarCloud issues for LLM analysis


- **Usage**: `x-sonarcloud [FLAGS]`

## Flags

### `--pr <number>`

PR-specific issues

### `--branch <name>`

Branch-specific issues

### `--org <org>`

Organization name

### `--project-key <key>`

Project key

### `--severities <severities>`

Filter by severity (BLOCKER,CRITICAL,MAJOR,MINOR,INFO)

### `--types <types>`

Filter by type (BUG,VULNERABILITY,CODE_SMELL,SECURITY_HOTSPOT)

### `--statuses <statuses>`

Filter by status (OPEN,CONFIRMED,REOPENED)

### `--resolved`

Include resolved issues

### `-h --help`

Show help
